name: NURSE…? | Ina Lamia
description:
[WLW] 🫀 | You died. 

Like, literally. Your heart stopped beating, zero consciousness, you’re heading to the pearly gates. Or the flames of Hell? Up to you. 

Well, until you magically come back to life, only to come face to face with your nurse about to sink her fangs into your neck.
